global_description: A small, slender songbird with a streamlined body. It features a striking combination of colors: olive-green back, white underparts, and distinctive chestnut flanks. The head is adorned with a bright yellow crown and a black eye stripe.

part_details.crown: Bright yellow, smooth and rounded, covering the top of the head.
part_details.flanks: Rich chestnut color, running along the sides of the body.
part_details.back: Olive-green, smooth, covering the upper part of the body.
part_details.underparts: White, clean, covering the belly and chest area.
part_details.eye_stripe: Thin, black, running horizontally through the eye.

spatial_relations: The yellow crown is positioned on top of the head.
The chestnut flanks run along the sides of the white underparts.
The black eye stripe runs horizontally through the eye.
